error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: Azure OpenAI authorization failure in self-hosted n8n
symptom: When trying to connect to Azure OpenAI in self-hosted n8n, the error 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials' appears. This indicates issues with the subscription key or API endpoint.
not_this_if: No error message related to authorization
root_cause: The error occurs when the provided subscription key is invalid or the API endpoint is incorrect. In self-hosted instances, the configuration may differ from the cloud version, leading to missing fields or incorrect settings.
fix_steps: Update your Docker Compose file to use the latest n8n version.
Remove all Docker cache and reinstall the n8n instance.
Verify that the correct API endpoint and subscription key are configured.
agent_instruction: Update your Docker setup to the latest n8n version and ensure correct API configurations.
